# PERF-144 negative: Content-Length is set before w.Write
lang: go
file: PERF-144-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	body := []byte("hello world")
	w.Header().Set("Content-Length", strconv.Itoa(len(body)))
	_, _ = w.Write(body)
}
